What about the monocot trees we talked about above?
We just said tree ferns were trees
Many trees are shorter lived than herbaceous plants, and we just said they don;t all have woody stems

The tree form is the adaptation. It isn't something trees have, it's something they are.
Narrower isn't synonymous with stricter, especially in science.
There is no more rigour to narrow definitions, nor is definitional exclusion a failure.
